ok fine since you insist, here is why kath sub dps doesnt work

Kath is a greedy unit, in order to play her at maximum potential, the team needs to revolve around kath. All of her mechanics revolve around scaling by spending fiamma, which means all your arithmetica is going to kath cards. You also need to rouse her which means 1 rouse slot is taken.

Ghelot is the same thing. You need to rouse gelot to scale her damage, and you also need to play her shackles a lot in order to set up bloodthirsty flails in your hand. This demands 9+ arithmetica before you can combo off with gelot since you are usually turning 3 or more shackles into flails.

As you can see, kath and ghelot both compete for your arithmetica and rouse priority. If you put both on the team, one is going to be roused second and one will have to be ignored while you set up the other.

Kath and ghelot both really, really want a specific posse to function. Putting one posse on your team means you are shafting the other dps and making them much worse.

Finally, both kath and gelot are capable of solo carrying a wave by themselves at low investment so there is literally no reason to run them on the same team in dtide.
If you knew how to play either kath or gelot properly, you would instantly see why running both in the same team is a bad idea
That is one point ot see it, but the other side is that one should be upfront on the limits of the testing before suggesting a particular strategy
